title: The Plan to Strike Big Mom
description: On pages 10–12, this part focuses on Capone Bege, Jinbe, Big Mom, Bege as Sanji chooses to return to Luffy, and the assassination plot against Big Mom begins taking shape.
scene: Sanji and Luffy reunite emotionally, turning the rescue mission into a direct conspiracy against Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I threw one of my jellybeans at him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Tell Mama that this was my decision.

dialogue.speaker: Capone Bege
dialogue.text: Tell me, was that mistaken, rock bege?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Big mom pirates one of the 3 commanders (second son of the Charlotte family)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: you will now reply "I see... that's fine, then."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Of all the people at this blasted party, this guy's the most trouble...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "He trained his observation haki so much that apparently,he can see a bit into the future." A monster with a '1 billion- plus bounty!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Her parties are always so delicious!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Would you like a welcome drink?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Today, we have "Lava from the Maliri volcano,"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: A glass of the giraffe, please.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sure thing. I'll wring that out for you right now.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The taste and mouthfeel are quite wonderful, too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thank you for coming from near and far!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Look to your right! And now your left!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everything you see is a sweet treat! Eat and drink to your heart's content!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Enjoy everything that happens here today!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Sanji Returns storyline with 37 dialogue beats. Sanji chooses to return to Luffy, and the crew joins Bege’s risky plan to attack Big Mom during the tea party.
